sources.title: Main Aisa Hi Hoon 2005 Dv DRip X 264 AC 3 Team DDH~ RG

metadata.Plot: Indraneel better known as Neel is mentally unfit, lives in a small hill station where everyone loves him works at a coffee shop and as single parent takes care of his daughter Gungun.Gungun's mother Maya was lonely and drug addict she met Neel when she needed desperately a companion.After giving birth to Gungun she suddenly disappears never to comeback.Many years later Maya's father Trivedi comes to take custody of his granddaughter as Neel is mentally not fit.A depressed Neel cant see his daughter going away from him and takes the help of a Lawyer Niti also a single mother.
metadata.Writer: Harry Baweja, Bhavani Iyer, Anurag Kashyap
metadata.Actors: Ajay Devgn, Sushmita Sen, Esha Deol
